title: acetosella frutescens
intro: Acetosella frutescens, also known as the cranberry clover or cranberry vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acetosella frutescens include the potential to support urinary tract health and reduce the risk of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of Acetosella frutescens, such as teas and tinctures, can be made from the plant's leaves and stems, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for medicinal purposes.
